member.name: T:Sandbox.JsonHelpers
member.summary: Shared JSON deserialization helpers for Network Storage responses. Handles type coercion (string → number), missing keys, and fallback defaults.

member.name: M:Sandbox.JsonHelpers.GetInt(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get an integer from a JSON element, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.JsonHelpers.GetFloat(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Get a float from a JSON element, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.JsonHelpers.GetString(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a string from a JSON element, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.JsonHelpers.GetBool(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get a bool from a JSON element, with fallback.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetLog
member.summary: Static ring buffer that captures Network Storage events for in-game debug windows. Used internally by NetworkStorage and available for game code to log custom events.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageBootstrap
member.summary:
Checks whether the editor assembly loaded after the Code assembly. Called from NetworkStorage.AutoConfigure() on first use.
Only warns in editor context when auto-configure fails — at runtime (published games) the client auto-configures from the credentials JSON and the editor is not available, so the warning is suppressed.

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorage
P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base API URL (no trailing slash).

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ApiVersion
member.summary: API version prefix.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ProjectId
member.summary: Your project ID from the sboxcool.com dashboard.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ApiKey
member.summary: Your public API key (sbox_ns_ prefix).

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.IsConfigured
member.summary: True after Configure() or auto-config has loaded valid credentials.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CdnUrl
member.summary: Optional CDN URL for storage reads (no trailing slash). When set and is a CDN domain, cache-busting is applied.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ApiRoot
member.summary: The full versioned API root, e.g. https://api.sboxcool.com/v3

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ProxyEnabled
member.summary: Whether proxy mode is enabled (host makes API calls on behalf of non-host clients). Defaults to true — safe for editor testing where only the host has a valid Steam session. Set to false in production when every player has their own Steam account.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.RequestProxy
member.summary: Delegate for proxying endpoint calls through the game host. The game registers this to route requests via RPC when proxy mode is active. Parameters: (targetSteamId, clientToken, endpointSlug, inputJson) → returns response JSON string or null.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.DocumentProxy
member.summary: Delegate for proxying document reads through the game host. Parameters: (targetSteamId, clientToken, collectionId, documentId) → returns response JSON string or null.

member.name: P:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.IsHost
member.summary: True if this client is the network host (or single-player).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.Configure(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Configure the client manually. Call once at game startup. If not called, the client auto-configures from credentials file on first use.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ResetAutoConfigureFlag
member.summary: Reset the auto-configure guard so AutoConfigure() can retry. Call this when the initial attempt failed and you want to retry (e.g. non-host client whose filesystem wasn't mounted yet).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.AutoConfigure
member.summary: Auto-configure from network-storage.credentials.json. Called automatically on first API use.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.TryConfigureFromNSConfig
member.summary: Try to configure from the auto-generated NSConfig class. This provides a fallback when the credentials file isn't available (e.g. non-host multiplayer clients, published games). NSConfig is generated by the Sync Tool with the project's public credentials.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CallEndpoint(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Call a server endpoint by slug. Returns the response body on success, null on any failure.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetGameValues
member.summary: Load all game values (groups + tables).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetDocument(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Read a document from a collection. If documentId is null, uses the current player's Steam ID.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CallEndpointViaProxy(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Route an endpoint call through the game host via the registered RequestProxy delegate.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetDocumentViaProxy(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Route a document read through the game host via the registered DocumentProxy delegate.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.CallEndpointAs(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Call an endpoint on behalf of another player (host only). Requires the client's auth token as proof of consent. Sends: host auth (Facepunch-verified) + client token + HMAC proxy signature scoped to this project + endpoint to prevent cross-server replay.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.GetDocumentAs(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Read a document on behalf of another player (host only). Requires the client's auth token as proof of consent.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ComputeProxySignature(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Compute HMAC-SHA256 proxy signature scoped to project + endpoint + client. Must produce the same hex string as the backend's computeProxySignature(). Format: HMAC-SHA256(apiKey, "projectId:endpointSlug:clientSteamId:clientToken")
Uses a pure managed SHA-256 + HMAC implementation because s&box's whitelist blocks System.Security.Cryptography.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.BuildUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Build the request URL with API key query param (no auth tokens in URL).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.BuildAuthHeaders
member.summary: Build auth headers containing the Steam ID and auth token. Sending auth via headers avoids URL-encoding issues that corrupt base64 tokens in query strings (+ decoded as space, etc.).

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.ParseResponse(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parse a server response. Returns the response data on success, null on any error. Detects errors via: ok=false, error object, or non-JSON responses.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorage.LogServerError(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: Extract and log error details from a server error response. Handles: { error: { code, message } }, { error: "msg" }, { message: "msg" }

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions
M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.Int(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get an int from a JsonElement, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.Float(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Get a float from a JsonElement, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.Str(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a string from a JsonElement, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.Bool(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get a bool from a JsonElement, with fallback.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.ReadStringList(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Read a JSON array property as a List of strings. Returns empty list if property missing or wrong type.

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.ReadDictionary``1(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Func{System.Text.Json.JsonElement,``0})
member.summary: Read a JSON object property as a Dictionary with a value converter. Useful for ore inventories: response.ReadDictionary("ores", v => (float)v.GetDouble())

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.ReadList``1(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Func{System.Text.Json.JsonElement,``0})
member.summary: Read a JSON array property as a List with a row converter. Useful for tables: response.ReadList("rows", row => new OreInfo(row))

member.name: M:Sandbox.NetworkStorageExtensions.FindMismatches(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.Object,System.Func{System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Object}}})
member.summary: Compare local state against a server response and return a list of mismatches. Fields is a dictionary of fieldName → (localValue, serverExtractor).

member.name: T:Sandbox.NetworkStorageProxyComponent
member.summary:
Bridges NetworkStorage proxy delegates to s&box RPCs.
When proxy mode is enabled (Editor → Network Storage → Settings): - Non-host clients route API calls through this component via [Rpc.Broadcast] - The host receives the request, calls CallEndpointAs / GetDocumentAs, and sends the result back - The client awaits the result via a TaskCompletionSource keyed by request ID
Security: The client's auth token is forwarded to the host, which includes it in the HMAC proxy signature sent to the backend. This proves client consent without requiring the backend to verify the client's token against Facepunch (which fails for non-host clients).
Attach to each player's GameObject via PlayerSpawner.

member.name: T:Sandbox.SaveStateTracker
M:Sandbox.SaveStateTracker.Call(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Call an endpoint with automatic save state tracking and logging. Sets State to Saving → Saved/Error. Logs to NetLog.

member.name: M:Sandbox.SaveStateTracker.CallAndApply(System.String,System.Object,System.Action,System.Action{System.Text.Json.JsonElement},System.Action)
member.summary: Call an endpoint, apply the result to a callback on success, revert on failure. Handles the optimistic update → server confirm → revert pattern.
